message:
fix: prevent Tab/BackTab from switching screens during text input

Tab and BackTab were intercepted unconditionally for screen switching,
making it impossible to use tab completion or tab navigation in text
input fields. Add guard conditions so these keys only trigger screen
switching when no text input is active.

Fixes Dicklesworthstone/frankentui#19

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
